title: Do this before the heat wave hits — and slash your cooling costs by $100 this summer
summary: Energy experts recommend Americans prepare for an upcoming dangerous heat wave by implementing cost-saving measures. Taking action before the heat arrives could reduce cooling costs by approximately $100 during the summer season. This preparation helps households manage both the safety risks and financial burden of extreme heat.
content: As millions of Americans brace for a dangerous heat wave this week, energy experts say they should prepare their wallets, too.

zh.title: 在热浪来临前采取行动——这个夏天将冷却成本降低100美元
zh.summary: 能源专家建议美国人通过采取省钱措施来为即将到来的危险热浪做准备。在热浪到来之前采取行动可以在夏季期间将冷却成本降低约100美元。这种准备帮助家庭应对极端高温带来的安全风险和经济负担。

title: This payments stock could jump as its profit push begins to pay off, Piper Sandler says
summary: Piper Sandler forecasts that a payments company's stock could experience significant gains as its profit improvement strategy gains traction. The company's efforts to increase revenue and reduce operating costs are expected to drive share price appreciation. This analyst view reflects optimism about the company's financial trajectory.
content: A push to rake in more revenue and lower its operating costs should give the company's shares a big bump, per Piper Sandler.

zh.title: 派杰称，随着利润推动开始见效，这只支付股票可能会大幅上涨
zh.summary: 派杰预测，随着支付公司的利润改善战略开始生效，其股票可能会出现显著上涨。该公司增加收入和降低运营成本的努力预计将推动股价升值。这一分析师观点反映了对该公司财务前景的乐观态度。

title: Fighting, bitterness and estrangement: How eldercare is ripping siblings apart
summary: Family relationships are frequently strained by the emotional and financial burdens of eldercare responsibilities. Siblings often experience conflict, estrangement, and communication breakdowns when managing aging parent care. These tensions highlight how caregiving needs can exacerbate existing family dynamics and create lasting damage.
content: “My brother doesn’t even call to ask about our mother”: The eldercare burden is often compounded by difficult relationships between brothers and sisters.

zh.title: 争执、怨恨和疏远：老年护理如何正在拆散兄弟姐妹
zh.summary: 家庭关系经常因为老年护理责任的情感和经济负担而承受压力。兄弟姐妹在管理老年父母护理时经常经历冲突、疏远和沟通中断。这些紧张关系凸显了护理需求如何会加剧现有的家庭动态，并造成持久的伤害。

title: Mike Santoli: A great first half, but some erratic behavior raises doubts about the rally's integrity
summary: The stock market showed strong performance in the first half of 2026 but exhibited erratic behavior that raises questions about the sustainability of the rally. Recent weeks have seen shifts from semiconductor dominance to broader market rotation away from mega-cap tech stocks. Market analyst Mike Santoli suggests this volatility may indicate underlying instability in the current market recovery.
content: For the past few weeks, the stock market has been attempting to rediscover some equilibrium after a stretch of semiconductor dominance, a breakdown in Mag7 stalwarts and more recently rotation toward the broader roster of non-tech stocks.

zh.title: Mike Santoli：上半年表现出色，但一些不稳定行为引发对涨势完整性的质疑
zh.summary: 股市在2026年上半年表现强劲，但表现出不稳定的行为，引发了对涨势可持续性的疑问。近几周出现了从半导体主导地位向更广泛市场轮动、远离大型科技股的转变。市场分析师Mike Santoli暗示，这种波动性可能表明当前市场复苏存在潜在的不稳定性。

title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Netflix, Tesla, Alphabet, AMD, Sandisk, Block, Broadcom & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued significant calls on major technology and payment companies including Nvidia, Netflix, Tesla, Alphabet, AMD, Sandisk, Block, and Broadcom. These analyst recommendations provide investment guidance for key market players across semiconductors, streaming, electric vehicles, and financial technology sectors. The calls represent important signals for investors tracking these companies' near-term performance.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Tuesday.

zh.title: 周二最大的分析师评级：英伟达、Netflix、特斯拉、Alphabet、AMD、SanDisk、Block、博通等
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师对包括英伟达、Netflix、特斯拉、Alphabet、AMD、SanDisk、Block和博通在内的主要科技和支付公司发出了重要评级。这些分析师建议为半导体、流媒体、电动汽车和金融科技等领域的关键市场参与者提供投资指导。这些评级代表了投资者追踪这些公司短期表现的重要信号。

title: Shetland backs plan to connect islands with £1.5bn undersea tunnels
summary: The Shetland Islands have approved a plan to construct £1.5 billion in undersea tunnels connecting the UK's northernmost islands. The infrastructure project is expected to be completed within eight years, improving transportation and connectivity. This ambitious engineering initiative aims to enhance economic and social connectivity for island communities.
content: The undersea links between some of the UK's most northerly islands could be in place within eight years.

zh.title: 设得兰群岛支持用15亿英镑海底隧道连接岛屿的计划
zh.summary: 设得兰群岛批准了一项耗资15亿英镑的计划，用海底隧道连接英国最北端的岛屿。该基础设施项目预计将在八年内完成，改善运输和连接性。这一雄心勃勃的工程项目旨在加强岛屿社区的经济和社会连接。

title: ‘She wants him gone’: My friend took in a homeless man as a caretaker. After 10 years, how can she evict him?
summary: A homeowner faces a complex legal and personal dilemma after a decade of housing a homeless man who has served as a caretaker in exchange for shelter. Despite the man's contributions to household management and care, the homeowner now wants him gone but faces uncertain eviction prospects. The situation illustrates the complicated intersection of charity, informal employment, and tenant rights.
content: “He lived rent-free, helping her with health-related issues and other tasks.”

zh.title: "她想让他离开"：我的朋友收留了一个无家可归的人作为看护者，10年后，她如何才能驱赶他？
zh.summary: 一位房屋所有者在收留了一位无家可归者作为看护者十年后面临着复杂的法律和个人困境。尽管这名男子对家庭管理和护理有所贡献，但房屋所有者现在想让他离开，但面临着不确定的驱赶前景。这种情况说明了慈善、非正式雇用和租户权利之间的复杂交集。

title: A 23% plunge in personal wealth leaves this country trailing its global peers
summary: A country has experienced a dramatic 23% decline in average personal wealth, putting it significantly behind comparable developed nations. The rapid deterioration in household wealth levels raises concerns about economic inequality and living standards. This gap with global peers suggests structural economic challenges that require policy attention.
content: The average wealth per person has rapidly dropped in this country — and it’s not looking good compared with other developed markets.

zh.title: 个人财富下降23%，该国被全球同行甩在身后
zh.summary: 某国人均个人财富大幅下降23%，使其远远落后于可比的发达国家。家庭财富水平的快速恶化引发了对经济不平等和生活水平的担忧。与全球同行的差距表明存在需要政策关注的结构性经济挑战。

title: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years. Here's what's driving it
summary: Small-cap stocks achieved their strongest first-half performance in 35 years, marking a significant reversal after years of lagging large-cap stocks. This outperformance reflects renewed investor interest and favorable market conditions for smaller companies. The shift suggests a potential rotation away from the mega-cap dominance that characterized recent market cycles.
content: The advance marks a sharp turnaround after years of underperformance versus large-cap peers.

zh.title: 小盘股迎来35年来最佳上半年表现，以下是推动力
zh.summary: 小盘股实现了35年来最强劲的上半年表现，标志着在多年落后于大盘股后的重大反转。这种出色表现反映了投资者的重新关注和对小型公司的良好市场条件。这一转变表明可能会出现远离近期市场周期中占主导地位的超大盘股的轮动。

title: White House AI crackdown opens door for Chinese model makers to close gap
summary: The Trump administration's restrictions on Anthropic's AI models may inadvertently advantage Chinese AI developers by reducing U.S. competitive advantage. The policy crackdown on a leading American AI company could allow Chinese competitors to narrow the technology gap. This regulatory approach raises questions about the geopolitical implications of constraining U.S. AI leadership.
content: The Trump administration's crackdown on Anthropic's leading artificial intelligence models is looking like a gift to China.

zh.title: 白宫AI打击为中国模型制造商打开缩小差距的大门
zh.summary: 特朗普政府对Anthropic AI模型的限制可能无意中通过削弱美国竞争优势而有利于中国AI开发者。对领先美国AI公司的政策打击可能允许中国竞争对手缩小技术差距。这种监管方式引发了关于限制美国AI领导力的地缘政治影响的疑问。

title: This memory stock is up eightfold in 2026. Bernstein sees more gains ahead
summary: A memory semiconductor stock has surged eightfold in the first half of 2026, with analyst Bernstein maintaining an outperform rating that suggests further upside. The exceptional gains reflect strong demand for memory chips, likely driven by AI infrastructure buildout. Bernstein's positive outlook indicates confidence in sustained growth prospects for the company.
content: The investment firm has an outperform rating on the memory name.

zh.title: 这只内存股票在2026年上涨八倍。伯恩斯坦看到更多涨幅
zh.summary: 一只内存半导体股票在2026年上半年飙升了八倍，分析师伯恩斯坦保持跑赢评级，表明还有进一步上升空间。这一异常涨幅反映了对内存芯片的强劲需求，可能由AI基础设施建设推动。伯恩斯坦的积极前景表明对该公司持续增长前景的信心。

title: Buffett delays annual donation to Gates Foundation pending review of Jeffrey Epstein ties: WSJ
summary: Warren Buffett has delayed his annual charitable donation to the Gates Foundation while it reviews its connections to Jeffrey Epstein. The foundation is conducting an examination of its historical ties to the convicted sex offender. This development reflects broader concerns about philanthropic organizations' accountability and their interactions with controversial figures.
content: This comes as the foundation continues to review its ties to the late sex offender Jeffery Epstein.

zh.title: 巴菲特延迟向盖茨基金会的年度捐款，待审查与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的关系：华尔街日报
zh.summary: 沃伦·巴菲特已延迟向盖茨基金会的年度慈善捐款，同时该基金会审查其与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的联系。该基金会正在检查其与被定罪的性犯罪者的历史联系。这一发展反映了对慈善组织问责制及其与争议人物互动的更广泛关注。

title: 20 stocks in the S&P 500 that plunged the most in 2026’s first half
summary: Twenty S&P 500 companies experienced significant stock declines in the first half of 2026 as investors feared AI tools would erode their market positions. The selloff reflects concerns that artificial intelligence and automation could disrupt traditional business models. This pattern suggests a market reassessment of companies vulnerable to AI-driven disruption.
content: These companies were hit hard as investors worried about eventual losses of market share to AI tools.

zh.title: 2026年上半年标普500指数中跌幅最大的20只股票
zh.summary: 在2026年上半年，标普500指数中有20家公司股价出现大幅下跌，投资者担心AI工具会侵蚀这些公司的市场地位。股价下跌反映了人们对人工智能和自动化可能破坏传统商业模式的担忧。这一现象表明市场正在重新评估容易受到AI驱动干扰的公司。

title: The big surprise for the year’s second half could be the AI trade powering higher. Why it wouldn’t take much.
summary: HSBC strategists suggest that renewed strength in AI stocks could emerge as a major surprise in the second half of 2026 despite recent scrutiny of the sector. AI stock valuations could climb significantly if investor sentiment shifts, even with modest catalysts. This outlook reflects strategic positioning for a potential reversal in AI stock performance.
content: HSBC strategists say persistent scrutiny of the artificial-intelligence trade could be met with surprise this year, if valuations of those stocks start to climb again.

zh.title: 今年下半年的大惊喜可能是AI交易走高——为什么这不需要太多条件
zh.summary: 汇丰银行策略师认为，尽管该行业最近受到审查，但AI股票的复兴力量可能成为2026年下半年的重大惊喜。如果投资者情绪转变，即使只有温和的催化剂，AI股票估值也可能大幅上升。这一前景反映了对AI股票表现潜在反转的战略定位。

title: Get ready for the summer rally, Wells Fargo tells investors
summary: Wells Fargo predicts a summer rally in equities, attributing recent volatility to quarter-end rebalancing rather than fundamental concerns. The bank expects stocks to perform well through mid-year before potential disruptions from November's midterm elections. This outlook suggests a favorable near-term environment for equity investors.
content: Recent volatility in equities was probably caused by quarter-end rebalancing, while future volatility may develop as midterm elections approach in November. Between times, though, stocks look set to flourish, argues Wells Fargo.

zh.title: 为夏季反弹做好准备，富国银行告诉投资者
zh.summary: 富国银行预测股市将出现夏季反弹，将最近的波动归因于季度末调整而非基本面担忧。该银行预期股票在年中前表现良好，但11月中期选举可能会造成干扰。这一前景表明股票投资者短期内环境有利。

title: BofA says these are the best seasonal trades for Q3, July and presidential cycle year 2
summary: Bank of America identifies seasonal trading opportunities for Q3, July, and the second year of a presidential cycle. The analysis aligns market patterns with predictable seasonal and political calendar trends.
content: Bank of America looks at seasonal trades for the third quarter, the coming month and the second year of a presidential cycle.

zh.title: 美银集团称这些是第三季度、七月和总统周期第二年最佳季节性交易
zh.summary: 美国银行公司确定了第三季度、七月和总统周期第二年的季节性交易机会。该分析将市场模式与可预测的季节性和政治日历趋势相一致。

title: Short sellers keep betting against Pop Mart — even though it's been a losing trade
summary: Short sellers continue wagering against Pop Mart International despite recent share price gains making their bearish positions increasingly costly. The persistence highlights divergent investor views on the Chinese toy collectibles company.
content: Short sellers are doubling down on Pop Mart International even as a recent share price recovery turns their bearish bets on the Chinese toymaker increasingly risky.

zh.title: 空头持续看空泡泡玛特——尽管这一直是一笔赔钱的交易
zh.summary: 尽管最近股价上涨使其看跌头寸成本不断增加，空头继续与泡泡玛特国际公司对赌。这种持续性反映了对这家中国玩具收藏品公司的不同投资者看法。

title: Japanese yen sinks to 40-year low, keeping intervention risks in focus
summary: The Japanese yen fell to its weakest level against the dollar in four decades, hitting lows unseen since 1986. The move keeps investors vigilant for potential intervention by Japanese officials to stabilize the currency.
content: The Japanese yen weakened to its lowest level against the U.S. dollar since 1986 on Tuesday, keeping investors on alert for possible intervention from Japanese authorities.

zh.title: 日元跌至40年低位，干预风险成焦点
zh.summary: 日元兑美元跌至四十年来最弱水平，创下自1986年以来未见的低位。这一举措使投资者对日本官员可能的干预以稳定货币保持警惕。

title: Rafael Nadal talks tennis prize money, his hotels, and what sports taught him about business
summary: Retired tennis legend Rafael Nadal is expanding his business ventures beyond sports, opening his fourth Zel hotel while diversifying into hospitality and education. His transition reflects how elite athletes leverage their success into broader entrepreneurial opportunities.
content: Rafael Nadal opened his fourth Zel hotel as he expands into hospitality, education and sports after retiring from tennis.

zh.title: 纳达尔谈网球奖金、他的酒店以及体育教会他的商业经验
zh.summary: 已退役的网坛传奇纳达尔正在扩展他的商业冒险，开设他的第四家泽尔酒店，同时拓展酒店和教育业务。他的转变反映了顶级运动员如何利用他们的成功进行更广泛的创业机会。

title: India's biggest share sales tell the story of a country glued to its phones
summary: Major Indian share offerings from NSE and Jio Platforms reflect the nation's dramatic digital transformation over the past decade. The IPOs showcase India's evolution toward mobile-first consumption, investment, and financial transactions.
content: NSE and Jio Platforms embody the sweeping changes in how India has consumed, invested and transacted over the past decade.

zh.title: 印度最大的股票销售讲述了一个沉迷于手机的国家的故事
zh.summary: 来自NSE和Jio平台的主要印度股票发行反映了该国在过去十年中戏剧性的数字转型。这些IPO展示了印度向移动优先消费、投资和金融交易的演进。

title: China factory activity grows faster than expected in June on tech export demand
summary: China's manufacturing activity expanded faster than anticipated in June, buoyed by strong AI-related technology exports that offset geopolitical disruptions. The growth underscores Beijing's competitive position in the global AI supply chain.
content: China's manufacturing engine held up this year as surging demand for artificial intelligence technology helped offset the drag from Middle East turmoil.

zh.title: 中国工厂活动在六月因科技出口需求增长快于预期
zh.summary: 中国制造业活动在六月扩张速度超过预期，受强劲的人工智能相关技术出口的推动，抵消了地缘政治破坏。这种增长强调了北京在全球人工智能供应链中的竞争地位。

title: Chinese tycoon sentenced to 30 years in US jail
summary: Chinese billionaire Guo Wengui was sentenced to 30 years in U.S. prison for operating fraudulent schemes that defrauded supporters who backed his anti-Beijing platform. The case highlights risks posed by charismatic figures exploiting political narratives for financial gain.
content: Guo Wengui branded himself as a China critic, gaining followers who backed his fraudulent schemes.

zh.title: 中国商人郭文贵在美被判30年监禁
zh.summary: 中国亿万富翁郭文贵因实施欺诈计划被判在美国监狱服刑30年，这些计划欺骗了支持其反北京平台的支持者。该案例突显了魅力人物利用政治叙事进行经济获利所带来的风险。

title: Australia's competition regulator takes Amazon to court over alleged unfair Prime subscription contract terms
summary: Australia's competition authority filed suit against Amazon, alleging unfair Prime subscription practices that required paying AU$2.99 to remove ads with no refund options. The case reflects growing global scrutiny of major tech firms' contract terms and consumer protections.
content: Australia's competition regulator is taking Amazon to court, alleging its Prime contracts required subscribers to pay AU$2.99 to avoid advertising, with no option for refunds

zh.title: 澳大利亚竞争监管机构就亚马逊Prime订阅合同条款不公平起诉亚马逊
zh.summary: 澳大利亚竞争权威机构对亚马逊提起诉讼，指控其Prime订阅做法不公平，要求支付2.99澳元才能移除广告且无退款选项。该案例反映了全球对主要科技公司合同条款和消费者保护的日益审视。

title: Japan is raising visa fees by up to 400% for the first time in nearly 50 years. Here's why
summary: Japan is increasing single entry visa fees from 3,000 to 15,000 yen, while multiple entry visas will rise from 6,000 to 30,000 yen. This marks the first visa fee increase in nearly 50 years and represents a significant cost escalation for international travelers.
content: A single entry visa will climb to 15,000 yen, from the 3,000 yen charged currently, while multiple entry visas will cost 30,000 yen, up from the 6,000 yen now.

zh.title: 日本近50年来首次将签证费上调至多400% 原因如下
zh.summary: 日本将单次入境签证费从3000日元上调至15000日元，多次入境签证将从6000日元上调至30000日元。这是近50年来首次调整签证费，对国际旅行者来说费用大幅增加。

title: Stock futures are little changed after the Dow posts new record close: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures remained largely flat following the Dow Jones Industrial Average's historic close above 52,000 on Monday. The rally was driven by gains in Alphabet shares and diminished U.S.-Iran tensions.
content: Gains in Alphabet and a pause in U.S.-Iran hostilities boosted the Dow Industrials to its first close above 52,000 on Monday.

zh.title: 道琼斯指数创新高后股指期货涨跌互现：实时更新
zh.summary: 在道琼斯工业平均指数周一创历史新高突破52000点后，美国股指期货基本持平。上涨由谷歌母公司股票上升和美伊紧张局势缓解所推动。

title: Apple supplier Luxshare seeks up to $3.1 billion in Hong Kong share sale
summary: Apple supplier Luxshare Precision Industry is pursuing a Hong Kong IPO to raise up to $3.1 billion in capital. The offering reflects strong investor appetite for companies in Apple's supply chain amid robust global demand for electronics.
content: Apple supplier Luxshare Precision Industry is seeking to raise as much as $24.27 billion Hong Kong dollars ($3.1 billion) through a Hong Kong share sale.

zh.title: 苹果供应商立讯精密在香港寻求最多31亿美元融资
zh.summary: 苹果供应商立讯精密工业正在寻求香港上市融资至多31亿美元。该融资反映了投资者对苹果供应链公司的强烈兴趣，原因是全球电子产品需求稳健。
